title: Asian food cart
description: Adds a small asian food cart, with new foods and Hiro the villager
body:
This simple Minecraft mod adds an Asian food cart to the plains and cherry grove biomes.

Inside, you'll find the villager Hiro (ヒロ).

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9e23ce559fa7aebb3d1fe98cb13e8359d80dcb0.jpeg)

The mod also introduces two new food items: Salmon Nigiri Sushi and Daikon.


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!
